heading: Omitted
label: 658 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided for a distribution of $150 from the judgment fund to each enrolled Indian, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act May 24, 1950, ch. 196, § 264 Stat. 190
